name: sentinel-risk-stratifier
description: Deterministic discharge risk stratifier using LACE+ scoring and live FHIR R4 snapshots. Produces a structured RiskCard with clinical drivers, medication flags, SDoH flags, and FHIR citations.

auth_schemes.description: SMART-on-FHIR OAuth 2.0 bearer token via x-sharp-access-token header

tools.name: fhir_discharge_snapshot
tools.description: Fetch a patient-centered FHIR R4 snapshot across 7 resource types in parallel.

tools.name: calculate_lace_plus
tools.description: Calculate deterministic LACE+ readmission risk score (0-19) with per-driver point breakdown.

tools.name: map_risk_drivers
tools.description: Map clinical drivers into a structured RiskCard with medication flags, SDoH flags, pending labs, and FHIR citations.
